zh.Kirton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓

zh.Boston, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾波斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Kirkton於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親William de Kirkton27歲，母親Elizabeth de Woodthorpe47歲。他於1289年與Beatrix Driby在英國林可爾史爾林肯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Kirkton于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲William de Kirkton27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Woodthorpe47岁。他于1289年与Beatrix Driby在英国林可爾史爾林肯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kirkton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from any of numerous places in Scotland so called, named as ‘church settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Kirkton was born about 1275, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Kirkton, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, was 47. He married Beatrix Driby in 1289, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1303, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Kirkton est né environ 1275, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Kirkton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix Driby en 1289, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1303, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Kirkton um 1275 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Kirkton 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Woodthorpe 47. Er hat 1289 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England Beatrix Driby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1303 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Kirkton è nato il circa 1275 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Kirkton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix Driby nel 1289, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1303, nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Kirktonが約1275年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Kirktonは27歳，母Elizabeth de Woodthorpeは47歳であった。1289年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンでBeatrix Dribyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Kirkton(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Kirkton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Woodthorpe(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1289년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 Beatrix Driby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Kirkton nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Kirkton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Driby em 1289, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1303, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Kirkton родился около 1275 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Kirkton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Driby в 1289 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1303 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Kirkton nació aproximadamente 1275, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Kirkton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Woodthorpe, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Beatrix Driby en 1289, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1303, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
